title: Determine clide's session schema (WIP per operator)
description: When mapping session schemas to harnesses, operator marked clide as "sort of undetermined at the moment. work in progress." Decide whether clide gets a dedicated clide-session-schemas family (its own conversation/daemon contract) or whether it composes inference-session-schemas / conversation-protocol-schemas without authoring a clide-specific family. Clide is the CLIA-native daemon harness (runtimeKinds: daemon + service + cli per its organism); the session shape may need to capture daemon lifecycle moments (start/stop/reload) that aren't in conversation-shaped families. Surface the decision to operator before authoring.
